overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot through a scenic river canyon in a video game environment. The camera glides over clear turquoise water between rocky cliffs, transitioning from a narrow gorge to an open area with distant rock formations and ancient stone structures. Bright sunlight creates sparkling reflections on the water surface throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: flying drone steadily forward through the narrow canyon following the river's path

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock
clear turquoise water with sparkling sun reflections
rocky cliff with patches of grass and red wildflowers
clusters of red flowers growing on the right bank
grassy area on the right canyon rim

segments.scene_description: The drone flies through a narrow, enclosed river canyon with steep rocky walls on both sides. Clear turquoise water flows below, reflecting bright sunlight. Red wildflowers dot the right bank while the canyon walls create a sense of vertical enclosure.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening river canyon with emerging distant stone structures

events.description: canyon walls recede and distant rock formations become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon gradually opens up, revealing ancient stone structures in the distance

entered.detail: large stone towers and formations visible at the canyon's end
large rocks scattered along the right riverbank

segments.scene_description: The canyon begins to open up as the drone progresses, with the steep right wall giving way to grassy slopes. Distant stone towers and formations appear on the horizon, hinting at ancient ruins ahead. The river remains central with scattered boulders visible along the banks.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon with monumental stone ruins and towers

events.description: canyon opens fully to reveal large ancient stone structures and towers ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive stone formations and ruins at the canyon's end while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: large ancient stone ruins with carved pillars and walls
tall cylindrical stone tower structure on the right cliff top
distant mountain range visible beyond the canyon

segments.scene_description: The canyon opens completely to reveal an expansive view of ancient stone ruins and monumental towers ahead. The drone approaches these large structures while the river continues flowing toward them. Distant mountains become visible in the background as the vertical canyon walls give way to open skies.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide through a narrow river canyon that gradually expands into a vast landscape of ancient ruins. It begins within a tight gorge of steep rocky walls, flying over clear turquoise water that reflects bright sunlight while red wildflowers dot the right bank. As the drone progresses, the vertical enclosure gives way to grassy slopes and scattered boulders, revealing distant stone towers and formations on the horizon. The scene then opens completely into an expansive vista, shifting from the confined canyon to a wide-open sky. Finally, the camera approaches monumental stone ruins and towering structures as distant mountains emerge in the background.
